description_long: This is a full drum kit set up on a rectangular patch of green grass, flanked by two large black speakers on stands and two white amplifier stacks. The drum kit features multiple brown wooden drums, including a bass drum, snare, toms, and a large floor tom angled upward, all mounted on a white metal frame. Several metallic cymbals are positioned above the drums, supported by chrome stands. The setup is designed for live outdoor performances, with the amplifiers and speakers suggesting a stage environment. The drums have a polished wood finish with white drumheads, and the hardware is metallic, likely chrome-plated steel. The overall arrangement is compact but complete, suitable for a band performance in a park or urban outdoor venue.
description: A complete brown drum kit with chrome hardware, set on grass and flanked by black speakers and white amplifiers, designed for outdoor performances.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full drum kit, cymbals, and both black speakers on either side.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the drum kit, the large floor tom, and the white amplifier stacks.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the amplifiers, the drum kit, and the arrangement of cymbals and drums.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the drum kit's hardware, the large tom, and the amplifiers.
